title: toxicodendron verniciferum
intro: Toxicodendron verniciferum, also known as the varnish tree or the lac insect tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa and Asia. The sap of this plant, which contains a resin called shellac, has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Toxicodendron verniciferum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as ointments, salves, and infusions, which have been used to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and other skin irritations.
